title: Notifications  - Update successful
scenario: Firmware update completion notification redirects to Software update complete screen when app is in background
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app and connect to a Poly Bluetooth audio device.
2. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings → Software Update.
3. Initiate a firmware update on the device.
4. While the firmware update is in progress, press the Home button or switch to another app to send the Poly Studio Mobile app to the background.
5. Wait for the firmware update to complete successfully.
6. Observe the notification area (status bar / notification shade) for a "Device is updated" notification.
expected: A "Device is updated" notification appears after the firmware update completes while the app is in the background. Tapping the notification redirects the user to the Software update complete screen in the Poly Studio Mobile app.
